question: Какой IP-адрес у production-сервера PROD в инфраструктуре Veritas Arcana?
rationale: Single-fact lookup across a table cell. Baseline retrieval test — every memory framework should handle this without any graph or temporal reasoning. Agent Dreamer and Munera bots ask this pattern when deploying to production.

question: Какой Google Analytics 4 Measurement ID используется для arcanada.one?
rationale: Identifier-style fact inside a nested bullet list. Tests whether the framework indexes alphanumeric IDs buried inside prose — retrieval on content-addressable tokens is foundational for any agent doing analytics or deploy work.

question: Какая версия Datarim framework указана в техническом контексте?
rationale: Version-number fact — a single line with a distinctive prefix. Frameworks that normalise away punctuation or markdown bolding will mis-score here; this probes token-boundary fidelity.

question: Сколько языков поддерживает многоязычный frontend проекта Consilium?

sources.snippet: multilingual: en, ar, de, es, he, ru, zh

ground_truth.answer_summary: 7 языков (en, ar, de, es, he, ru, zh)

rationale: Counting-over-enumeration fact — the user asks for a count, the document lists the items. Any framework that can recall the list can derive the count; failure here means the underlying retrieval is lossy.

question: Какое облачное хранилище используется для vault Veritas Arcana?
rationale: Direct phrase lookup — one of the most common workflow questions (ops staff checking sync behaviour). Tests retrieval on a named service with multi-word brand.

question: Какой SSL-сертификат используется на Arcanada сайтах?
rationale: Compound fact across parentheses — the answer has a name + a modifier + a mode. Probe for whether the framework preserves parenthetical qualifiers or drops them as noise.

question: Под каким доменом хостится GitLab-инстанс?
rationale: Domain-name fact. FQDN tokens are a common corner case — some embeddings split on dots, some preserve. Surfaces tokenisation strategy differences.

question: Сколько серверов Hetzner Bare-Metal указано в таблице Infrastructure в techContext?

ground_truth.answer_summary: 5 серверов: PROD, DB, TEST, Email, Web

rationale: Requires counting rows in a markdown table — the literal number is not stated, the framework must either return the whole table or enumerate. Edge case between factual and multi-hop.

question: Сколько областей знаний (areas) в whitelist wiki schema?

ground_truth.answer_summary: 6 областей: AI, arcana, security, business, tools, philosophy

rationale: Count-over-enumeration in wiki corpus. Wiki is sparse (4 files) — framework must still find relevant table. Tests corpus-size robustness.

question: Какой максимальный уровень вложенности страниц разрешён в wiki иерархии?
rationale: Rule-style fact with an inline path pattern. Tests whether the framework treats backtick code fragments as semantic content or as formatting to be stripped.

question: На каких языках преимущественно пишется user-facing контент в базе знаний?

ground_truth.answer_summary: Russian (русский) — для user-facing; English — для кода, комментариев, имён переменных.

rationale: Rule lookup in style guide. Agents that compose content need this — a factual retrieval failure would cause downstream generation in the wrong language.

question: Какой шаблон ID используется для задач в Datarim?
rationale: Format-pattern fact — important for any task-routing agent. Tests retrieval of conventions expressed inside backticks.
